title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Permutation-Based Rule Testing
steps.summary: Permutation-Based Rule Testing belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Representation Learning / Model Compression. Start after Rule-Based System and Rule-Based Systems.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Contextual Bandits
steps.summary: Contextual Bandits belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Representation Learning / Model Compression. Compare it with Contextual Reranker and Fisher Information Matrix. It opens into Contextual Bandits Techniques and Contextual Bandits Techniques Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fisher Information Matrix

steps.summary: Contextual Reranker belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Representation Learning / Model Compression. Compare it with Contextual Bandits and Fisher Information Matrix.

steps.title: Rule Extraction from Policies
steps.summary: Rule Extraction from Policies belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Representation Learning / Model Compression. Compare it with Permutation-Based Rule Testing and Fisher Information Matrix.
